hero.description: Reduce your physical stocks and work with fast delivery. Definitive and standardized solutions in 3D printing and engineering for industry.
hero.feature_1: We produce technical parts on demand from 3D models, drawings or physical parts.
hero.feature_2: We serve everything from prototypes to functional replacement for real use and operational continuity.
hero.img_footer_desc: Solutions for maintenance, replacement and development with high standard visual finish.

materials.header_desc: Select a category to view available options for your application.

general.title: General Purpose Materials
general.desc: Ideal for non-critical uses without mechanical requirements.

items.name: PETG (Polyethylene Terephthalate Glycol)
items.desc: Versatile material with an excellent balance between strength, flexibility, and printability.

engineering.title: Engineering & Composites
engineering.desc: Technical polymers reinforced for high structural and thermal performance.

items.name: Nylon CF (Carbon Fiber Reinforced Nylon)
items.desc: High-performance composite that combines the toughness of nylon with the rigidity of carbon fiber.

items.name: TPU (Industrial – flexible)
items.desc: Thermoplastic Polyurethane for parts requiring flexibility, impact absorption, and abrasion resistance.

advanced.title: Ultra-Performance Polymers
advanced.desc: Materials for extreme temperature conditions and chemical resistance.

items.name: PEEK (Polyether Ether Ketone)
items.desc: The pinnacle of engineering polymers, capable of replacing metals in critical applications.
applications: Parts near engines or intense heat sources

items_desc.petg_desc: Rapid prototyping with excellent visual finish and low cost.
items_desc.nylon_desc: Carbon fiber reinforced for maximum stiffness and mechanical strength.
items_desc.peek_desc: Ultra-high performance polymers for aerospace and chemical applications.

intelligence.title: Choose Wisely
intelligence.desc: Our technical team helps you define the ideal material based on:
items: Exposure to chemical agents or solvents

op_tech.desc: Constant monitoring to ensure dimensional accuracy.

materials.footer_note: * Exact properties depend on the specific polymer chosen.

why.header_desc: We deliver more than parts: we deliver the security that your production line will not stop.
why.title: Advantages and
why.subtitle: Definitive solutions for your industry with cutting-edge technology.

advantages.title: High Availability
advantages.desc: Ideal for discontinued or urgent parts.

why.adv_subtitle: Value proposition presented with more contrast and hierarchy.
why.commercial_arg: Each card now functions as a commercial argument: easy to scan, clearer and with consistent visual presence.
why.services_title: Services organized as a premium portfolio
why.logistics_detail: Service sensitive to port demands and critical operation.

services.title: Personalized Technical Support
services.desc: Developed by professionals with real field operation and maintenance experience.

services.title: Suitable material with compatible mechanical characteristics

logistics.title: Logistics Coverage
logistics.desc: Delivery of parts throughout Brazil with a special focus on fast port service.

case.title: Specialty Valve - Chemical Industry
case.desc: A critical part failed on the production line, halting operations. Through reverse engineering and high-performance 3D printing, we delivered the solution in record time.
case.prob_val: Line stoppage due to missing replacement part.

steps.title: Model Submission
steps.desc: Sending the scanned model or physical part.

steps.title: Production
steps.desc: Up to 3 days after completing step 2.

tech.title: Applications
tech.desc: Solutions focused on replacement, operational continuity, and rapid development of parts on demand.
tech.industrial_3d_desc: Parts on demand for replacement, adaptation and functional prototyping.

items.title: Replacement of broken parts
items.desc: Production of replacement components to reduce downtime and resume operations.

items.title: Discontinued parts
items.desc: Alternative for out-of-line items or items with low market availability.

items.title: Functional prototypes
items.desc: Quick validation of geometries and performance before final production.

items.title: Adaptations and improvements
items.desc: Adjustments to existing parts for adaptation, reinforcement, or functional gain.

items.title: Custom tools and fixtures
items.desc: Tailor-made solutions for internal use, assembly, support, and operation.

cta.title: Your project deserves
cta.desc: Our team analyzes the feasibility and returns with the budget and suggested ideal material.
